'''''Dreadnaught-Two''''', known as '''''D-Two''''' for short, was the second of six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] used on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.

==History==
It came directly off of the [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] line for use on the project in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].

[[Feeven]] lived on ''Dreadnaught-Two'', and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Evrios]] was responsible for the ship's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] affairs.

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
